title: User Registration Success
description: Verify that a new user can register successfully with valid data and receives appropriate role assignment.

steps.description: Navigate to the registration page.
Input valid username, email, and password.
Submit the registration form.
Verify registration success message is displayed.
Verify user role is assigned correctly and user is authenticated.

title: User Login with Correct Credentials
description: Check login functionality with valid username/email and password.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter a registered username/email and correct password.
Click the login button.
Verify user is successfully logged in and redirected appropriately.

title: User Login Failure with Incorrect Password
description: Verify login fails with incorrect password and appropriate error message is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to the login page.
Enter a registered username/email and incorrect password.
Click the login button.
Verify login failure message is displayed and user remains on login page.

title: Password Reset Flow Success
description: Verify that a user can initiate and complete the password reset process successfully.

steps.description: Navigate to the forgot password page.
Submit registered email for password reset.
Verify password reset email is sent.
Open password reset link from email.
Enter and confirm new password.
Verify password reset success confirmation.

title: AI Studio Image Generation with Valid Prompt
description: Verify AI Studio generates a valid image output from a user-provided prompt.

steps.description: Navigate to AI Studio image generation page.
Enter a valid image generation prompt.
Submit the prompt for generation.
Verify the generated image is displayed and matches prompt context.

title: AI Studio Logo Generation with Empty Prompt
description: Verify the system handles an empty prompt gracefully and shows appropriate error.

steps.description: Navigate to AI Studio logo generation page.
Submit an empty prompt.
Verify an error message about the required prompt is shown.

title: Print Services Display and Selection
description: Verify print services are listed correctly and user can select digital printing, large format, or event stands.

steps.description: Navigate to the print services page.
Verify all print service types are displayed with correct info.
Select digital printing service.
Verify digital printing details are shown and selectable.

title: Product Catalog Browsing and Detail Viewing
description: Verify product catalog loads, products are listed, and individual product detail pages display correctly with configurations.

steps.description: Navigate to product catalog page.
Verify a list of products is displayed with pagination or infinite scroll.
Select a product to view details.
Verify product detail page shows product info, images, and configuration options.

title: Shopping Cart Management for Mixed Product Types
description: Verify shopping cart correctly adds, updates, and removes both digital and physical products reflecting accurate totals.

steps.description: Add a physical product to the shopping cart.
Add a digital product to the shopping cart.
Verify cart shows both products with correct quantity and price.
Update quantity of a product in the cart.
Verify cart total updates correctly.
Remove a product from the cart.
Verify product is removed and totals adjusted accordingly.

title: Checkout Flow with PayPal Payment and 3DS Authentication
description: Verify the standard checkout process completes successfully with PayPal including 3DS authentication.

steps.description: Proceed to checkout with items in the cart.
Select PayPal as the payment method.
Complete PayPal payment flow including any required 3DS authentication.
Verify order confirmation is displayed.
Verify order status is updated and available in user dashboard.

title: Checkout Flow with Wompi Payment and 3DS Authentication
description: Verify the checkout process completes successfully with Wompi payment processing including 3DS authentication.

steps.description: Proceed to checkout with items in the cart.
Select Wompi as the payment method.
Complete Wompi payment flow including 3DS authentication.
Verify order confirmation is displayed.
Verify order status is updated and visible in user dashboard.

title: Simplified Checkout Flow Completion
description: Verify users can complete the simplified checkout flow without errors.

steps.description: Add items to cart.
Navigate to the simplified checkout page.
Complete checkout inputs and submit.
Verify successful completion and order confirmation.

title: Order Management View for User
description: Verify user can view their orders with detailed status and tracking information.

steps.description: Login as a standard user.
Navigate to user order history page.
Verify list of user orders is displayed with up-to-date status.
Select an order to view detailed tracking info.
Verify order detail page shows tracking and order processing steps.

title: Admin Dashboard Access and Orders Management
description: Verify admin users can access the admin dashboard, view, filter, and update orders.

steps.description: Login as admin.
Navigate to admin orders management page.
Verify order list is displayed with filtering and sorting options.
Select and update an order status.
Verify order status updates persist and trigger email notification.

title: User Dashboard Displays Orders, Designs, and Account Info
description: Verify user dashboard shows personalized orders, designs created, and account details.

steps.description: Login as user.
Navigate to user dashboard page.
Verify orders list is correct and up-to-date.
Verify AI-generated designs are listed and accessible.
Verify account information displays and user can update details.

title: Digital Product Download Post Purchase
description: Verify users can securely download digital products after successful purchase.

steps.description: Complete purchase of a digital product.
Navigate to digital downloads page in user dashboard.
Verify digital product appears with download link.
Click on download link.
Verify file download starts and is complete.

title: Interactive Design Editor Customization and Preview
description: Verify user can customize products with design editor and preview changes before purchase.

steps.description: Navigate to product page supporting design editor.
Open interactive design editor.
Apply different design customizations (images, logos, fonts).
Verify preview updates in real-time reflecting changes.
Save customized design and add product to cart.
Verify customized product is added with correct attributes.

title: Quote Request Submission and Management
description: Verify users can submit custom order quote requests and admins can manage these quotes.

steps.description: Login as user and navigate to quote request page.
Fill out quote request form with valid data.
Submit the quote request.
Verify submission success confirmation.
Login as admin and navigate to admin quotes management page.
Verify quote request is listed and details are accessible.

title: Internationalization Toggle Between English and Spanish
description: Verify users can toggle interface language between English and Spanish and translations are accurate.

steps.description: Navigate to main page.
Switch language from English to Spanish.
Verify all visible UI text updates to correct Spanish translations.
Switch back language to English.
Verify UI text changes back to English accurately.

title: UI Responsiveness and Accessibility Across Devices
description: Verify the platform's UI components render properly, are responsive, and accessible on desktop, tablet, and mobile.

steps.description: Access the platform on desktop viewport.
Verify UI layout is correctly displayed and navigable.
Access the platform on tablet viewport.
Verify UI components resize and reorganize correctly.
Access the platform on mobile viewport.
Verify all navigation and content remains accessible and functional.
Test accessibility features such as keyboard navigation and screen reader support.
Verify compliance with accessibility best practices.

title: Email Notifications Triggering on Key Events
description: Verify email notifications are sent to users upon events like registration, password reset, order confirmation, and quote updates.

steps.description: Trigger user registration.
Verify registration confirmation email is sent.
Trigger password reset request.
Verify password reset email is sent.
Complete an order checkout.
Verify order confirmation email is sent.
Update a quote status as admin.
Verify quote update notification email is sent to user.

title: Role-based Access Control Enforcement
description: Verify that user and admin roles have appropriate access restrictions for different platform areas.

steps.description: Login as a standard user.
Attempt to access admin dashboard.
Verify access is denied or redirected for unauthorized users.
Login as admin user.
Access admin dashboard and all management pages.
Verify full access granted to admin functionalities.

title: Error Handling for Payment Failures
description: Verify system handles payment failures from PayPal and Wompi gracefully and notifies user with actionable messages.

steps.description: Initiate checkout with PayPal.
Simulate payment failure or decline.
Verify error message displayed and user can retry or select another payment method.
Repeat for Wompi payment method.
Verify similar error handling behavior.
